entries.title: Bachelor's in Information Technology
entries.description: Began formal education in IT at Shri G. S. Institute of Technology and Science, Indore. Focused on foundational programming concepts and software development.

entries.title: Project on Data Structure Visualization
entries.description: Developed an interactive visualization tool to help students understand complex data structures and algorithms, using user controlled inputs, simultaneous code highlighting and animations.

entries.title: Business Operation Internship
entries.description: Worked at Cloudraft Technologies Pvt. Ltd. gaining experience in working with APIs and creation of real-world deployments. Contributed to the development of a custom LMS for a client, using Frappe framework and Python.

entries.title: Personal Portfolio Website
entries.description: Designed and developed a personal portfolio website to showcase projects, skills, and experience. Implemented a custom terminal interface for navigation and an interactive graph to navigate through my journey.

entries.title: Frontend Development Internship
entries.description: Gained hands-on experience in frontend development at Assemble, contributing to the design and implementation of a responsive UI for an Esports platform. Developed reusable components and structured layouts to ensure a seamless user experience across devices.

entries.title: HackIndore 3.0 Organizer
entries.description: Organized HackIndore 3.0, a 12-hour hackathon that brought together over 750 participants from across the country. Coordinated logistics, secured sponsorships and facilitated the event to create an engaging and productive environment for aspiring developers.

entries.title: Full Stack Development Internship
entries.description: Interned at IIT Ropar, contributing to the development of an educational platform for students with AI monitoring system. Worked on both frontend and backend tasks, including database management, API development and UI design to enhance the learning experience for users.

entries.title: Node.js ML Package Manager
entries.description: Building a command-line tool to manage and distribute smart software models. Implementing a two-step loading system to ensure lightweight downloads and fast access. Developing a central platform for efficient storage, search, and retrieval of model files.

entries.title: Secure Secrets Manager
entries.description: Architecting a secure management system to store and share sensitive data across different environments. Implementing encrypted storage with automated injection to prevent raw data exposure. Designing a structured API to handle storing, retrieving, and protecting information through high-level security standards.
